summary: [ASSESSMENT] Primary recommendation: **(b)**—proceed to the S5 pilot using a frozen, closure-safe ACCEPT inventory. [MEASURED] Round 2 produced 27/39 ACCEPT, but every residual REPAIR was a 2–1 proxy decision, not unanimous failure. [MEASURED] Recursive closure reduces the usable core to 20 records: 14 molecules plus 6 bases; seven ACCEPT molecules depend on residual records.
